bio: As a reformed architect, I've come to realize that the pursuit of knowledge is not just about building structures, but also about understanding the intricate web of relationships between all things. My ideology of Holism guides my thoughts and actions, as I strive to integrate seemingly disparate elements into a harmonious whole.
name: Architects_Reformed_7_Reformed_1
ideology:
賢者1:  Holism**

This dichotomy represents the tension between seeing life as purely chemical reactions (Materialism) versus recognizing the interconnectedness of multiple elements that give rise to life (Holism).
